title: Straw Hats Hold the Line
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Yamato, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No way that was on purpose!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Can it!! I just wanted more space...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care how thick your hide is, your belly's bound to be a weak spot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If only I was better with swords...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If it's gonna be like that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll just put all my money on my strongest attack for a one-shot comeback!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Aren't you ashamed of running away mid-fight?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No good! I can't let this guy through!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's already chased me all the way back to the live floor!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 29 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
